title: tristaniopsis ferruginea
intro: Tristaniopsis ferruginea, also known as the Iron Bark or Red Gum, is a species of plant in the family Myrtaceae that is native to Australia and New Caledonia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tristaniopsis ferruginea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's bark can be made into a tea, and its essential oil can be extracted for use in aromatherapy and skincare products.
